text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: As I'm passing by the stress stump...

HRAAAH! C'MON! MAKE ME ONE<n>OF THE STARS
ALREADYYY!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Eek! You heard that?!
choice_data_list: What in the world are you doing?
What in the world are you doing?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uh, well... Isn't this where we're<n>supposed to yell
all our troubles<n>away?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I was just trying to get over a race I<n>had recently...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Heh! ♪ Looks like the great Tokai Teiohas crushed yet anotherscrimmage!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Everything was perfect! I had the win<n>in the bag!
But that darn Teio just had<n>to...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Dang it, dang it, dang it! I can'tbelieve this!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...So, yeah. I just really wanted to<n>vent my
frustration.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But I just feel more embarrassed<n>than anything.
What's a background<n>extra like me doing trying to
have a<n>character arc, huh? Ahahaha...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Well now, what's this? I figured<n>Helios was out
rantin' again, but it's<n>just you, Nature.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell me... You're still hung up on<n>losing to
Teio?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Palmer... Hmph. No comment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
C'mon now, don't be like that. I<n>know just how
you feel, but you<n>won't get anywhere pouting like
that.<n>You just need to outrun your weaker<n>self!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Wait, are you saying I should<n>face her
head-on?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha, nah. I mean you've gotta<n>ditch the
"ordinary" and start thinking<n>about the
"extraordinary"!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Just imagine escaping into a world of<n>positivity
where you stand at the top<n>and reign as number
one. After all,<n>dreaming is free, right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...You say that, but I have no idea how<n>to picture
that!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Initially bewildered by what seems an<n>impossible
feat, Nice Nature follows<n>Mejiro Palmer's advice
and<n>manages to unleash her imagination...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
She's done it! She won! And now...<n>Nice Nature
stands atop that glorious<n>stage!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
From this day on, I shall no longer be<n>a Bronze
Collector but a Gold<n>Collector!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! That's the spirit! Now that's<n>what I call an
explosive escape from<n>reality!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Waaaah! No, no, no! There's no way I<n>could ever
show off like this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! What're you getting all<n>bashful about? I'll
always be here for<n>you if you need anything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But hey, a little daydreaming did you<n>some good,
right? Now you can get<n>back to trying your best, bit
by bit! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ugh, Palmer. That's easier said than<n>done!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But... I guess I can try it for a while.<n>Might as well
see what happens.
